title: About Me
text: Hello! I am Aidan Mistry, a fourth year student currently studnying at Dublin City University. For my first and secind year of school I studied at Brock University in Ontario Canada. Ranging from my thesis to machine learning algorithms this portfolio is a collection of works I’ve developed during my time in college. In my free time I enjoy watching theatre, playing soccer, reading and brain puzzles.

My Long-term Career Goals
In the long-term I hope to pursue a career in consulting or operations. I’ve always found the problems that arise in these business sectors to be very interesting. I’m confident in my ability to think on my feet and critically and I feel both of these business sectors allow for those skills to shine.

title: Data Visualisation with Python
text: This project demonstrates my ability to embed Python code directly into a Quarto document, generating interactive data visualisations.

title: Data Visualisation with Python
text: This project demonstrates my ability to embed Python code directly into a Quarto document, generating interactive data visualisations.

title: Data Visualisation with Python
text:
Interactive Plot
Below is a Python code chunk that generates an interactive line chart. You can hover over the data points to see the exact values!

import plotly.express as px
import pandas as pd

# Create a sample dataset
df = pd.DataFrame({
    "Day": ["Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri"],
    "Productivity Level": [70, 85, 90, 65, 95]
})

# Generate the interactive plot
fig = px.line(
    df, 
    x="Day", 
    y="Productivity Level", 
    title="Weekly Productivity Trend", 
    markers=True
)
fig.show()
